strengths: Proven experience building event-driven systems and open-source infrastructure with real-world deployment (GISCollective, DLang services)
Hands-on involvement in AI-agent tooling and MCP frameworks at re:cinq, aligning with agentic AI architecture needs
Strong full-stack engineering background with demonstrated ability to ship production systems across diverse domains (fintech-adjacent data pipelines, real-time APIs)
concerns: Current career gap since October 2025 raises questions about recent active leadership and technical momentum
No explicit evidence of leading engineering teams beyond 10–15 people or managing hybrid external engineering models
Lack of demonstrated experience in regulated fintech environments (credit risk, compliance, working capital systems)
response.justification: The candidate brings tangible experience with event-driven architectures and emerging agentic AI tooling, aligning with core technical requirements, but lacks demonstrable background in regulated fintech systems and executive-scale engineering leadership, which are critical for this role.
